title: Apple App Store threatened to remove Grok over deepfakes: letter
summary: In a letter to senators sent in January, Apple detailed how it responded to Elon Musk's X and Grok generating sexualized deepfakes.
content: Apple privately threatened to remove Elon Musks artificial intelligence app, Grok, from its App Store in January after Musks xAI failed to do enough to stop it from creating nude or sexualized deepfa…

title: Faherty’s Cofounder on Turning a Childhood Goal Into a Global Brand
